mapper.select: SELECT id, name, daily_price, facilities, image, capacity FROM room_type
SELECT id, name, daily_price, facilities, image, capacity FROM room_type WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_type (name, daily_price, facilities, image, capacity) VALUES (#{name}, #{dailyPrice}, #{facilities}, #{image}, #{capacity})
mapper.update: UPDATE room_type SET name = #{name}, daily_price = #{dailyPrice}, facilities = #{facilities}, image = #{image}, capacity = #{capacity} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE room_type SET capacity = IFNULL(capacity, 0) - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND IFNULL(capacity, 0) > 0
UPDATE room_type SET capacity = IFNULL(capacity, 0) + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
